title: EmbedTaskRetryRequest
description: Reprocess request published by vector-service's ReconcileJob when a chunk exists in kb_knowledge.knowledge_search_idx but is missing from Milvus. The consumer (kb-doc-processor) is expected to re-fetch the chunk text from knowledge_clean, re-embed it, and re-publish a full embed-task message.

traceId.description: Trace id of the reconcile run that triggered this retry.

reason.description: Why this retry was issued. Consumers may use this for telemetry tagging.
